presentation.description: I specialise in building fast, accessible, and carefully designed web experiences. I work with React, Vite, and modern APIs. I am interested in performance and scalability in projects.

experience1.description: Development of an automated booking and payment system via WhatsApp for the barbershop “El Bigote Siberiano”, storing data in Google services such as Sheets and Calendar.
achievements: Designed and developed an end-to-end booking ecosystem integrating WhatsApp Business API, Make, and Google Workspace.
Implemented a natural language processing engine in TypeScript to normalise dates and times to ISO 8601 format.
Improved reservation success rate by migrating to a deterministic logical flow system, ensuring accurate data capture.

about1.title: Who I am
about1.description: I am a dedicated web developer with a strong focus on creating intuitive and high-performance applications. I enjoy solving complex problems and constantly learning new technologies to improve my workflow.

about2.title: My experience
about2.description: I have worked on various fullstack projects, from management systems for local businesses to mobile applications powered by REST APIs.

project1.description: Comprehensive web application for grocery store management, featuring inventory tracking and a point-of-sale system.
achievements: Implemented secure RBAC for user permissions.
Engineered a robust Node.js and MySQL backend.
Integrated a modern and intuitive React frontend.

project2.description: Mobile application powered by PokeApi for exploring Pokémon characteristics.
achievements: Designed optimized mobile interface for high-quality UX.
